problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Liquid. Liquid crystal elastomer actuation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
